title: February 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 22''' is the 53rd day of the year. There are 312 days remaining, 313 in leap years.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[James Hong]] is born.
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Barry Dennen]] is born.
*[[1950s#&1955|1955]] – [[Mark Boudreaux]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Steven Speirs]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Duane Swierczynski]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Hadley Kay]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 3|''Star Wars Weekly'' 3]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 36|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 36]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 140|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 140]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 2|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 2]] published.
*2006 – ''[[Star Wars: Empire: Volume Five: Allies and Adversaries]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 4|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 4]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Dawn of Rebellion]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Luke Skywalker – Lightsaber Training]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good]]'' published in paperback.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures, Volume Two]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The High Republic: The Edge of Balance, Vol. 2]]'' eBook published.
*[[2023]] – "[[Retrieval (episode)|Retrieval]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 29|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 29]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures: The Nameless Terror 1|''The High Republic Adventures: The Nameless Terror'' 1]] published.
*2023 – [[Yoda 4|''Yoda'' 4]] published.
*[[2025]] – "[[RJ Makes Music]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
